m1-prod-artifact-adversarial-focused.evidence: Focused no-cache prod-artifact M1 sweep for one row/surface across postgres and sqlite.

m2-security-real-build-gate.evidence: Security certification proofs must exercise the production kovo build path, not fixture-only shortcuts.

m3-security-gate-mutations.evidence: Mutation harness kills branch removals in enrolled security and census gates.

m1-prod-artifact-readonly-endpoint.evidence: Production artifact readonly endpoint tests build with kovo build --no-cache and exercise default plus SQLite readonlyDb mutation-attempt paths.

m1-prod-artifact-transactions.evidence: Production artifact transaction/raw-SQL starter tests build with kovo build --no-cache and exercise default plus SQLite runtime SQL handle paths.

m1-prod-artifact-managed-write-escape.evidence: Production artifact transaction tests build default and SQLite starters with kovo build --no-cache and prove managed write raw-driver escape attempts fail before artifact emission.

h-managed-db-runtime-type.evidence: Managed DB tests exercise readonlyDb raw SQL, transaction, future-method runtime fail-closed behavior and a compiler-backed Reader<Db> type-surface proof.

m1-prod-artifact-query-wire.evidence: Production artifact /_q query-wire proof builds default and SQLite starters with kovo build --no-cache, serves dist/server/server.mjs, and observes escaped body plus private cache headers.

m1-prod-artifact-island-derive.evidence: Production artifact island-derive browser test builds with kovo build --no-cache, fetches the served client module, clicks hydrated state, and checks helper-derived client artifacts.
